CapabilitySpec.description: Delete a previously saved file from the document store. Used exclusively as the rollback capability for save_attachment. Validates file checksum before deletion to ensure the correct file is removed.

saved_path.description: Full path of the file to delete. Must match the saved_path from the original save_attachment result.

checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum of the file to delete. Validated before deletion to prevent accidental removal of wrong file.

original_trace_id.description: Trace ID of the save_attachment execution being rolled back. Written to audit log.

deleted_path.description: Path of the deleted file. Confirms what was removed.

rollback_verified.description: True if checksum matched and file was successfully deleted.
